blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 111 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
